[![conda-version] ![conda-latest]](https://anaconda.org/tidywf/r-tidywigits)

[conda-version]: <https://anaconda.org/tidywf/r-tidywigits/badges/version.svg> "Conda package version"
[conda-latest]: <https://anaconda.org/tidywf/r-tidywigits/badges/latest_release_date.svg> "Conda package latest release date"

The conda package is available from the tidywf channel at
<https://anaconda.org/tidywf/r-tidywigits>.

```bash
conda create \
  -n tidywigits_env \
  -c tidywf -c conda-forge \
  r-tidywigits==0.0.7.9000

conda activate tidywigits_env
```
